folksonomy.title: Injini yeFolksonomy
folksonomy.subtitle: Izitshixo zokujonga
folksonomy.description: I-Folksonomy ivumela abasebenzisi ukuba bongeze iithegi zesiko kwiimveliso. Bhrawuza onke amaqhosha akhoyo angezantsi, khangela izitshixo ezithile, okanye ucofe nakweliphi na isitshixo ukuze ubone iimveliso ezisisebenzisayo.
folksonomy.progress_bar: Usage frequency indicator: {percent}% relative to other keys

key_visualization_guide.title: Key Visualization Guide:
key_visualization_guide.badge_products_end: shows the number of products using this key
key_visualization_guide.badge_values_end: shows the number of unique values for this key
key_visualization_guide.progress_bar: The progress bar represents how commonly the key is used relative to other keys

folksonomy.no_keys_available: No Folksonomy keys available. Keys will appear here once they are created.
folksonomy.no_keys_found: No keys found with the current search query.

home.intro_1: Vula uMhloli weeNgcaciso zoKutya sisixhobo sokuphonononga i-Open Food Facts database.
home.intro_2: Ungangenisa ikhowudi yemveliso kwibar yokukhangela ngasentla ukuze uqalise okanye ucofe kwenye yeemveliso ezingezantsi.

folksonomy.intro_before: These properties are created and filled by users for any kind of usages. Feel free to add your own. The properties and values you create

folksonomy.link_docs: properties' documentation and its search engine

datasources.title: Imithombo yedatha
datasources.last_modified_t: Ukuhlelwa kokugqibela kwephepha lemveliso ku {date} ngu
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Layisha imifanekiso ecacileyo yemveliso, izithako, kunye neenyaniso zesondlo ukunceda abanye ukuba bachonge imveliso.
info.basic_info: Nika iinkcukacha ezingundoqo malunga nemveliso, njengobungakanani, ukupakishwa, kunye nomvelisi.
info.languages: Yongeza amagama emveliso kunye neenkcazo ngeelwimi ezahlukeneyo ukwenza imveliso ifikeleleke kubasebenzisi abaninzi.
info.ingredients: Dwelisa zonke izithako ezikhoyo kwimveliso. Oku kunceda abasebenzisi nge-allergies okanye ukhetho lokutya.
info.nutrition: Faka amaxabiso ezondlo nge-100g/ml njengoko kubonisiwe kwipakethe. Oku kunceda abasebenzisi bathelekise iimveliso.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Ngokuzithandela, yongeza inkcazo ukuchaza utshintsho lwakho okanye unikeze umxholo owongezelelweyo.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Eli xabiso linceda ukwenza ubalo olulungelelanisiweyo lwesondlo ngasinye ngokwesayizi yokukhonza. Umzekelo, 60 g, 60g okanye 60 G (khetha eyokuqala), 1000 ml okanye 1L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Keep the original order. Indicate the percentage when specified. Separate with a comma or hyphen and use parentheses for ingredients of an ingredient.
tooltips.categories: Bonisa kuphela udidi oluthile. Iindidi zabazali ziya kongezwa ngokuzenzekelayo. Umzekelo, 'iSardines kwioyile yomnquma', 'Ijusi yeorenji esuka kwiconcentrate'.
tooltips.product_name: Igama lemveliso ligama eliphambili eliprintiweyo kwi-package. Isenokuba luphawu lokuthengisa olubhalisiweyo. Umzekelo, 'Nesquik', 'I-Tomato Ketchup'. Ungafaki uphawu egameni
tooltips.brand_name: Faka zonke iibrendi zemveliso. Uphawu oluphambili, ngokuqhelekileyo luboniswe ngokucacileyo kwipakethi yangaphambili, kufuneka ifakwe kuqala. Umzekelo, 'Nutella,' Oreo, Mondelez'
tooltips.quantity: Khuphela ixabiso elibonisiweyo kwimveliso kwaye ungalibali iiyunithi. Umzekelo, 230g, 6 (ngamaqanda ama-6), 3 x 150g (kwimveliso enebhokisi ezi-3, nganye ye-150g).
tooltips.labels: Naluphi na uphawu lwemveliso **eyinyani** kwaye yahlukile kweminye imimandla. Umzekelo, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Yenziwe eBelgium, iveliswe eBrittany…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Faka ivenkile apho uthenge imveliso. Umzekelo, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Yongeza naziphi na izibonakaliso zemvelaphi onokuzifumana kwipakethe. Awunakukhathazeka malunga nemvelaphi eboniswe ngokuthe ngqo kuluhlu lwezithako. Umzekelo, 'Inyama yenkomo yaseArgentina', 'Isoya ayiveli kwiManyano yaseYurophu'.
tooltips.traceability_code: Kweli candelo, ungafaka iikhowudi ezihambelana namanqaku okupakisha, amanqaku okuchongwa okanye amanqaku ezempilo.
tooltips.countries: Amazwe apho imveliso ifumaneka ngokubanzi (kungabandakanywa iivenkile ezikhethekileyo kwiimveliso zangaphandle).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Name

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Enter the number of packaging units of the same shape and material contained in the product.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Enter the shape name listed in the recycling instructions if they are available, or select a shape.
packaging_component.material_desc: Enter the specific material if it can be determined (a material code inside a triangle can often be found on packaging parts), or a generic material (for instance plastic or metal) if you are unsure.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Enter recycling instructions only if they are listed on the product.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Enter the net weight or net volume and indicate the unit (for example g or ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer

missing_number.title: Serving size is missing a number
missing_number.desc: Serving size should include a numeric value. Examples: {examples}

missing_unit.title: Serving size is missing a unit
missing_unit.desc: Serving size should include a unit. Examples: {examples}

unknown_unit.title: Serving size unit may be incorrect
unknown_unit.desc: Serving size should include a common unit. Examples: {examples}

edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Sukufaka iifoto ongengowakho okanye ongenalungelo lazo. Ukulayisha imifanekiso enelungelo lobunikazi ngaphandle kwemvume akukho mthethweni kwaye kunokubangela ukuba iakhawunti yakho inqunyanyiswe.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Faka kuphela iifoto zakho okanye ezo unemvume ecacileyo zokuzisebenzisa.

qr.barcode_scanned_not_found: Ibhakhowudi {barcode} yaskenwa ngempumelelo, kodwa akukho mveliso yafunyanwayo kwiiNyaniso zethu ezivulekileyo zoKutya, iinyani ezivulekileyo zobuhle, iiNyaniso zeeMveliso ezivulekileyo okanye iiNyaniso eziVulekileyo zokuTya kwezilwanyana.

network.title: Impazamo yoQhagamshelwano
network.message: Ayiphumelelanga ukunxibelelana neseva yeeNqaku zoKutya ezivulekileyo. Nceda ujonge uqhagamshelo lwakho lwe-intanethi kwaye uzame kwakhona.
network.instructions: Ukuba ingxaki iyaqhubeka, tyelela i-Open Food Facts Status Page.

facets.facet_website_description: Fumana udidi lwe {facet} kwi-Open Food Facts Explorer.
facets.facet_value_website_description: Fumana udidi lwe {value} kwi-Open Food Facts Explorer.

landing.title: Vula Ukukhangela Iinyaniso Zokutya
landing.subtitle: Ugcino lwendibaniselwano, lwasimahla noluvulekileyo lweemveliso zokutya ezivela kwihlabathi jikelele. Fumana, khangela, kwaye wenze igalelo ekukhanyeni kokutya kumntu wonke.
landing.explore_products_desc: Jonga izigidi zeemveliso zokutya, bona iinyani zesondlo, kwaye wenze ukhetho olunolwazi.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

explore.title: Phonononga iinyani zoKutya okuVulekileyo
explore.subtitle: Fumana iimveliso ezihamba phambili, iindidi ezidumileyo, kwaye ube negalelo ekuhleni kokutya!
explore.trending_products_desc: Bona ukuba zeziphi iimveliso ezijongwayo kwaye zihlelwe kakhulu ngoku.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Khangela ezona ndidi zidumileyo zokutya kwi-database yethu.
explore.recently_added_desc: Jonga iimveliso zamva nje ezongeziweyo luluntu.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Nceda uphucule i-Open Food Facts ngokongeza okanye ukuhlela iimveliso, okanye ukuphendula imibuzo.
explore.random_product_desc: Ukuziva unethamsanqa? Fumana imveliso engacwangciswanga kwisiseko sedatha yethu.
explore.learn_more_desc: Fumana indlela i-Open Food Facts esebenza ngayo kunye nendlela onokunceda ngayo.

compare.page_description: Compare nutritional information of food products
compare.share_text: Check out this product comparison I made!
compare.add_products_hint: Add products from their detail pages to start comparing nutritional values
compare.replace_comparison: This will replace your current comparison with {count, plural, =1 {1 product} other {# products}}. Continue?
compare.invalid_link_hint: This link doesn't contain any valid products to compare
compare.name: Name
compare.hint_relative_first: 💡 Percentages show difference compared to the first product
compare.hint_relative_best: 💡 Percentages show difference compared to the best value (lower is better for most nutrients)
